name: Simple Router — Agent Robustness & Error Handling
description:
Rubric-based tests for agent robustness when requests are incomplete, fields are invalid, or tools surface problems.
Tests that agents ask for clarification, surface validation issues clearly, and gate writes behind confirmation.

Note on mock tools: get_invoice_details returns identical hardcoded data for any invoice ID.
True 'not found' errors require real backend integration and cannot be tested today.
These cases test robustness within the current mock.

Scorer: rubric_based_final_response_quality_v1, threshold 0.8.

Cases:
  E1  error_validation_failure_communicated — Validation issues named clearly
  E2  error_missing_invoice_id_asks         — Agent asks for missing ID rather than guessing
  E3  error_update_requires_confirmation    — Write gated behind confirmation prompt

parts.text: set the VAT rate on invoice 10 to 25%
